questions.question: Write a Java code snippet that converts a ResultSet into an array of Strings using the toArray() method. Explain the benefits of using this method.

Suppose you have a ResultSet of integers, and you want to convert it into an array of Strings. How would you achieve this using the toArray() method? What are the potential pitfalls you might encounter?
Compare and explain the difference between the toArray() method and the Arrays.toString() method in Java. Provide an example code snippet that demonstrates when to use each method.
